title: Siddaramaiah To Lead Two-day Campaign In Bagalkot From March 30
description: On March 30, the Chief Minister will land at Almatti Dam Helipad and head to Bagalkot taluk, where he is scheduled to address a series of campaign meetings at Sutagundar, Nayanegali, Rampur, and Bevoor villages between 1 pm and 6 pm. He will halt at Almatti for the night
